source_intent.raw_intent: Case 056: I am a healthcare_admin in South Asia. Build a srx_ace_workflow for content_system using the operator_lens. Chaos input type is schema_blur. The source is intentionally messy: mix missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Produce a governed artifact with explicit validation gates. Return something SR8 can compile into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

parsed_tester_json.compiled_intent: Objective: Build a governed SRX ACE workflow for a healthcare content system in South Asia, handling schema_blur chaos input with explicit validation gates. Scope: - The workflow must ingest messy, ambiguous content requests (missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, unclear acceptance criteria) and produce a validated, structured artifact suitable for SR8 compilation. Constraints: - Must operate under South Asian healthcare regulatory frameworks (e.g., data localization, patient privacy). - Must use operator_lens to detect and resolve schema_blur (ambiguous or missing schema fields). - Must include explicit validation gates at each stage: ingestion, normalization, schema resolution, compliance check, output generation. - Must reject or flag any content that fails validation with clear reason. - Must not assume complete input; must handle partial or contradictory constraints gracefully. Success Criteria: - Workflow processes a schema_blur input and produces a valid SR8-compilable output with Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract. - All validation gates are triggered and logged. - Output contract includes fields: artifact_type, depth_tier, runtime_target, should_block, blocked_reason, compiled_intent. - No hallucinated or fabricated data; all fields derived from input or explicitly marked as unresolved. Output Contract: - artifact_type: srx_ace_workflow - depth_tier: D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE - runtime_target: Codex - should_block: False - blocked_reason: None - compiled_intent: Objective: string; Scope: string; Constraints: string; Success Criteria: string; Output Contract: object
